title: [BLINK] BLACKPINK討論區(24) 痴線佬大量出沒注意

replies.msg:
BLACKPINK（韓語：블랙핑크）是YG娛樂於2016年推出的韓國女子音樂組合，由JISOO、JENNIE、ROSÉ與LISA四名成員組成。2016年8月8日以數碼專輯《SQUARE ONE》正式出道。

YG娛樂表示BLACK PINK帶有稍微否定粉紅色是最美的顏色的涵義，具有「漂亮並不代表全部」的反轉意義，也表示成員們不僅具備外貌、同時也兼具實力。

BLACKPINK 將於 7 月 20 日搶先在武道館舉行 showcase《BLACKPINK PREMIUM DEBUT SHOWCASE》，並於 8 月 30 日正式發行出道專輯。

BLACKPINK 宣告將於7月舉辦首次日本巡迴演出“BLACKPINK ARENA TOUR 2018”。 7月24日得大阪公演為開始，在福岡、千葉等日本三大城市共舉辦六場演出。

replies.msg:
Additionally, don’t buy tickets from a foreigner if they themselves aren’t going to the concert!

The requirement for foreigners is to pick up the tickets in person, using a passport as ID.
If the original buyer isn’t there
**you won’t be able to get the ticket**

Claiming tickets:

Koreans can have tickets be physically sent to their address before the concert. Foreigners have to pick it up and present a passport ID.

If you have a KR address and buy from a Korean seller, you can ask them to have the ticket sent there.

If a non-Korean sells you a ticket, the only way you can get it from them is **in person the day of the concert**

Unless they go thru the trouble of buying it from a Korean, having the ticket sent to a KR address, and then sending it to you, they *cannot give a physical ticket*
